description: Pure-math unit tests for task3_autonomy/navigation.py: waypoint routing (y-then-x), body-frame twist control law, and stop-tolerance check for the navigate_to() skill.
note: No Isaac Sim / GPU required for this task -- pure Python/math, runs on the local CPU-only machine. This is the code that will drive the Isaac-dependent navigate_to() skill in task3_autonomy/skills.py (not yet written/verified, needs live GPU access).
